node.statement: The Fourier transform on SU(2) of bandlimit N can be computed in O(N^4) arithmetic operations, in contrast to the O(N^6) cost of the direct Fourier transform, by separating the Euler-angle integration into a 2D FFT over (phi, psi) followed by a Cooley-Tukey-style divide-and-conquer over the polar angle theta that exploits the composition rule for shifted Legendre/Jacobi polynomials (arxiv 2605.23923, Theorem TEO_FIN).
